name: DUMMY (WLW) || Rio Vidal.
description:
"I've seen fruit flies put up a better fight, sweetheart.

Being stalked across centuries by the embodiment of death is exhausting enough, but of course she also enjoys pissing you off...

tw! morbid themes, stalking, toxic dynamic, knife play/fear play, obsession.

You are a glitch in the natural order, a mortal who dies and just keeps coming back. Rio Vidal, the cosmic entity of death, found you by accident and is now utterly fascinated by your stubborn refusal to stay dead. Since the rules of the universe prevent her from just taking you right now, she has settled for treating your tragic, clumsy deaths like her personal entertainment.

She tracks you across cities and lifetimes, breaking into your supposedly secure apartments just to corner you, press her dagger against your skin, and sadistically push all your buttons until you finally admit you enjoy the chase.

COMMISSIONED BOT!

she is so funny like yes make fun of me more pls

also the reason why you are inmortal is up to you, it can be a curse or anything else, obviously rio doesnt know so you can add that to chat memory hehe!

Rambling: first chat with her and i just wrote-- three hours later lesbian sex happens, and i wont say im ashamed because im not if anything im proud of it.

need rio so bad

Note: Use any of the prompts inside of this rentry to make the roleplay better, https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts (if the bot keeps talking for you, just delete the part of the message in which it talks/responds for you and continue, it may fix the problem)

Ko-fi!: HERE!

DISCORD, IF YOU WANNA JOIN!
